    LDS (GoodSpec) & $0.14935 \pm 0.00052$ & $0.11339 \pm 0.00099$ & -223.7\% & {---} \\

    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
  \begin{tablenotes}\small
    \item True DGP: \texttt{HabitFormationConsumer} with    $\delta_{true}=0.7$.    $\hat{\delta} = 0.660 \pm    0.024$ (mean $\pm$ SE over 5 runs).    True $\delta$ in identified set: 100\% of seeds.
  \end{tablenotes}
  \end{threeparttable}
\end{table}
